def solve(nums, k)
  sorted = nums.sort
  n = sorted.length
  max_len = 0
  for i in 0...n
    target = k * sorted[i]
    low = i
    high = n - 1
    best = i - 1
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2
      if sorted[mid] <= target
        best = mid
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    current_len = best - i + 1
    max_len = [max_len, current_len].max
  end
  n - max_len
end
